source_pr.title: plan: fix bug of merge join/ stream agg + order by.
source_pr.body: when check whether the order properties can be pushed, we should check the prefix.

symptoms: sql: "select /*+ TIDB_SMJ(t1,t2,t3)*/ * from t t1, t t2, t t3 where t1.c = t2.c and t1.d = t2.d and t3.c = t1.c and t3.d = t1.d order by t1.c", (plan/dag_plan_test.go)
failure_signature: sql: "select /*+ TIDB_SMJ(t1,t2,t3)*/ * from t t1, t t2, t t3 where t1.c = t2.c and t1.d = t2.d and t3.c = t1.c and t3.d = t1.d order by t1.c", (plan/dag_plan_test.go)
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: sql: "select /*+ TIDB_SMJ(t1,t2,t3)*/ * from t t1, t t2, t t3 where t1.c = t2.c and t1.d = t2.d and t3.c = t1.c and t3.d = t1.d order by t1.c", (plan/dag_plan_test.go)
